title: Pixel Glasses
body:
#Pixel Glasses Mod by Gardon

If you like wearing glasses or just want to add some freshness to your game then this mod is for you!

#Pixel Glasses Mod About

The mod is quite simple! It adds a few new glasses to the game that we can put on and proudly wear, improving the appearance of our character a bit! They provide a few points of protection, so thanks to them we can also arm ourselves a little!

#Pixel Glasses Mod Ending

In closing, I'll mention that the mod has been an inspiration to me for a long time! Because I wanted to create such a nice and pleasant addition that many of you will surely like!
